member.name: M:MeterManagementService.Controllers.MeterV1Controller.GetAll
member.summary: List all meters (results cached 60 s). Use v2 for filtering.

member.name: M:MeterManagementService.Controllers.MeterV1Controller.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get meter by system GUID.

member.name: M:MeterManagementService.Controllers.MeterV1Controller.GetBySerial(System.String)
member.summary: Get meter by physical serial number. Most useful for field engineers who have the meter serial but not the system ID.

member.name: M:MeterManagementService.Controllers.MeterV1Controller.Create(MeterManagementService.DTOs.MeterCreateDto)
member.summary: Onboard a new meter into the HES. Returns 409 if the SerialNumber is already registered.

member.name: M:MeterManagementService.Controllers.MeterV1Controller.Update(System.Guid,MeterManagementService.DTOs.MeterUpdateDto)
member.summary: Update meter configuration. Only non-null fields are changed.

member.name: M:MeterManagementService.Controllers.MeterV1Controller.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Remove a meter from the HES system (permanent).

member.name: M:MeterManagementService.Controllers.MeterV1Controller.SetRelay(System.Guid,MeterManagementService.DTOs.RelayCommandDto)
member.summary: Issue a remote relay connect/disconnect command to a smart meter. In production: triggers a DLMS SetRequest to the meter via EcoSEnter. In this mock: updates the RelayStatus field in the database. Only supported on IsSmart=true meters.

member.name: M:MeterManagementService.Controllers.MeterV2Controller.GetAll(System.Nullable{MeterManagementService.Models.MeterType},System.Nullable{MeterManagementService.Models.MeterStatus},System.Nullable{MeterManagementService.Models.CommunicationType},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: List meters with optional filtering. [NEW IN V2] All parameters are optional and combinable.

member.name: T:MeterManagementService.DTOs.MeterCreateDto
member.summary: Payload for onboarding a new meter into the HES.

member.name: T:MeterManagementService.DTOs.MeterUpdateDto
member.summary: All fields optional — only provided fields are changed.

member.name: T:MeterManagementService.DTOs.MeterResponseDto
member.summary: Full meter details returned by API responses.

member.name: T:MeterManagementService.DTOs.RelayCommandDto
member.summary: Remote relay connect/disconnect command payload.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.DTOs.RelayCommandDto.Action
member.summary: "connect" or "disconnect"

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.DTOs.RelayCommandDto.Reason
member.summary: Reason for audit trail (e.g. "Prepaid balance exhausted", "Non-payment").

member.name: T:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter
member.summary: A meter registered in the AMI / HES system. Maps to the "Meters" PostgreSQL table via EF Core.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.SerialNumber
member.summary: Physical serial number stamped on the meter body. Globally unique. Used for all field operations and DLMS addressing.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.Model
member.summary: Product model name. E.g. "AURORA", "REGOR", "REGOR LTCT", "ORION", "TAURUS", "ATRIA", "ER300P". Determines which data profiles (load survey, billing, tamper) are supported.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.MeterType
member.summary: Meter phase/measurement category from the SE product catalogue.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.IsSmart
member.summary: Whether this is a smart meter (remote read) or a digital-only meter (local read). Non-smart meters have no remote communication capability.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.IsPrepaid
member.summary: Whether this is a prepaid meter (TAURUS / ATRIA). Prepaid meters manage credit balances and relay control based on balance.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.AccuracyClass
member.summary: Accuracy class per IS standard. E.g. "Class 1.0", "Class 0.5s", "Class 0.2s".

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.VoltageRating
member.summary: Nominal voltage. E.g. "240V (P-N)", "3×240V (P-N)", "3×63.5V (P-N)".

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.Standards
member.summary: IS standards this meter is certified under. E.g. "IS 16444 Part 1, IS 15959".

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.CommunicationType
member.summary: Primary communication technology used to connect meter to HES.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.DcuId
member.summary: Data Concentrator Unit ID for RF Mesh / NAN meters. Null for direct-cellular meters (they talk to HES directly via SIM).

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.SimNumber
member.summary: SIM/IMSI number for cellular meters (4G or NB-IoT).

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.DlmsLogicalDeviceName
member.summary: DLMS logical device name used for COSEM addressing (e.g. "SAG0012345678").

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.ConsumerNumber
member.summary: Consumer account number from the utility billing system.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.InstallationAddress
member.summary: Physical installation address.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.Latitude
member.summary: GPS latitude of installation. Null if not yet surveyed.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.Longitude
member.summary: GPS longitude of installation. Null if not yet surveyed.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.Zone
member.summary: Metering zone / feeder / substation name for grouping. E.g. "MYSURU-NORTH", "FEEDER-12", "SS-HEBBAL".

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.SubstationId
member.summary: Substation or distribution transformer identifier.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.Status
member.summary: Lifecycle status of this meter in the HES.

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.RelayStatus
member.summary: Current state of the meter's internal relay. Smart meters support remote connect/disconnect via HES command (DLMS).

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.FirmwareVersion
member.summary: Firmware version as reported by the meter (e.g. "2.1.4-AURORA").

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.TodEnabled
member.summary: Whether Time-of-Use / Time-of-Day tariff is configured on this meter. TOD meters have different tariff rates by time slot (e.g. peak 18:00–22:00).

member.name: P:MeterManagementService.Models.Meter.Notes
member.summary: Notes from field engineers (installation remarks, fault history, etc.).

member.name: T:MeterManagementService.Models.MeterType
member.summary: Meter type / phase configuration. Directly maps to the SE MPS Mysuru product catalogue (PPT slides 3–8).

member.name: T:MeterManagementService.Models.CommunicationType
member.summary: Communication technology used by the meter to reach the Head End System. From PPT slide 4 and network architecture slide 13.

member.name: T:MeterManagementService.Models.MeterStatus
member.summary: Meter lifecycle status in the HES system.

member.name: T:MeterManagementService.Models.RelayStatus
member.summary: State of the meter's internal relay (load control). Smart meters (AURORA, REGOR) support remote connect/disconnect via DLMS command.
